title: The Suits Valuation Act, 1887
full_text: The Suits Valuation Act, 1887 वाद मूल्‍यांकन अधिनियम,1887 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 188707 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 1887-02-11 Act Year: 1887 Short Title: The Suits Valuation Act, 1887 Hindi Title: वाद मूल्‍यांकन अधिनियम,1887 Long Title: An Act to prescribe the mode of valuing certain suits for the purpose of determining the jurisdiction of Courts with respect there to. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Legal Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-03-1889 Last Updated: 04-02-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Suits Valuation Act, 1887 PART I SUITS RELATING TO LAND PART II OTHER SUITS PART III SUPPLEMENTAL PROVISIONS Section 1. Title. Section 2. Extent and commencement of Part I. Section 3. Power of State Government to make rules determining value of land for jurisdictional purposes. Section 4. Valuation of relief in certain suits relating to land not to exceed the value of the land. Section 5. Making and enforcement of rules. Section 6. Repeal of section 14 of the Madras Civil Courts Act, 1873. Section 7. Extent and commencement of Part II. Section 8. Court-fee value and jurisdictional value to be the same in certain suits. Section 9. Determination of value of certain suits by High Court. Section 10. [Repealed.]. Section 11. Procedure where objection is taken on appeal or revision that a suit or appeal was not properly valued for jurisdictional purposes. Section 12. Proceedings pending at commencement of Part I or Part II.
